标题: LP Loropiana washed denim jeans with a sleek cut visible to the naked eye, featuring a straight slim fit style! Sizes available: 29-38, excluding 37.

LP Loropiana 2026ss early spring runway collection features a detachable set of single suit jacket and trousers with a metal logo on the chest and sleeve cuff. The suit is tailored with a sleek and ergonomic design, giving a smart and comfortable fit, showcasing a gentlemanly style. The suit is a great choice for stylish men, with a structured silhouette and waist-cut design for added comfort and a slim yet handsome look. Available in sizes 29-38 for trousers and 46-58 for suits.
